name: Homemade Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: Dijon mustard (1/2 tsp, or more to taste)
Lemon juice (1 tbsp) OR White Wine Vinegar
Light olive oil (1 cup) OR Peanut oil OR Vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the egg yolk to room temperature by placing it in a bowl of hot water for 2-3 minutes, or until it no longer feels chilled when held.
2. Separate the yolk into another bowl.
3. Combine the egg yolk, salt, Dijon mustard, and lemon juice (or vinegar) in the bowl with the yolk. Set aside on a folded towel to prevent movement.
4. Whisk the ingredients together briskly until thoroughly blended.
5. Begin adding the oil drop by drop at first, then gradually increase the amount.
6. Continue adding oil until it is completely incorporated into the mixture.
7. Taste the mayonnaise and adjust seasoning with additional salt, lemon juice, or vinegar as desired.
8. If a thicker consistency is preferred, stir in hot water (a spoonful or two) until reaching the desired texture.
Makes 1 1/2 Cups
